title: cornopteris tenuisecta
intro: Cornopteris tenuisecta, also known as the slender forked fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cornopteris tenuisecta include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by drying the leaves and stems, then using them in teas or as a topical application.
